option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# This workflow will build a golang project # For more information see: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/automating-builds-and-tests/building-and-testing-go
name: Go
on: push: branches: [ "main", "feature/**", "copilot/**", "dependabot/**", "**-macos" ] pull_request: branches: [ "main", "feature/**", "copilot/**", "dependabot/**", "**-macos" ]
jobs:
verify_test_script: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Python uses: actions/setup-python@v6 with: python-version: '3.12'
- name: Install dependencies run: | python -m venv .venv .venv/bin/pip install flask cryptography shell: bash
- name: Verify test script run: pwsh -File test_curl.ps1 curl
build_and_test: needs: verify_test_script strategy: matrix: os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest] include: - os: ubuntu-latest binary: ./kemforge pip: .venv/bin/pip - os: windows-latest binary: ./kemforge.exe pip: .\.venv\Scripts\pip - os: macos-latest binary: ./kemforge pip: .venv/bin/pip runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }} steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5 if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos')
- name: Set up Go if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Set up Python if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-python@v6 with: python-version: '3.12'
- name: Install dependencies if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: | python -m venv .venv ${{ matrix.pip }} install flask cryptography shell: pwsh
- name: Build if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: go build -v .
- name: Test application if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: pwsh -File test_curl.ps1 ${{ matrix.binary }}
- name: Run application if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: ${{ matrix.binary }} -I https://www.google.com
verify_install: needs: [verify_test_script, build_and_test] strategy: matrix: os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest] runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }} steps: - name: Set up Go if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Install kemforge via go install if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: go install github.com/ConnectingApps/kemforge@${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}
- name: Add Go bin to PATH (Linux/macOS) if: matrix.os != 'windows-latest' && (matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos')) run: echo "$(go env GOPATH)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
- name: Add Go bin to PATH (Windows) if: matrix.os == 'windows-latest' run: | $GoBin = go env GOBIN $GoPath = go env GOPATH $BinPath = if ($GoBin) { $GoBin } else { "$GoPath\bin" } [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path", $env:Path + ";$BinPath", "User") echo "$BinPath" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_PATH -Encoding utf8 shell: pwsh
- name: Run kemforge if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: kemforge -I https://www.google.com

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# This workflow will build a golang project # For more information see: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/automating-builds-and-tests/building-and-testing-go
name: Go
on: push: branches: [ "main", "feature/**", "copilot/**", "dependabot/**", "**-macos" ] pull_request: branches: [ "main", "feature/**", "copilot/**", "dependabot/**", "**-macos" ]
jobs:
verify_test_script: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Python uses: actions/setup-python@v6 with: python-version: '3.12'
- name: Install dependencies run: | python -m venv .venv .venv/bin/pip install flask cryptography shell: bash
- name: Verify test script run: pwsh -File test_curl.ps1 curl
build_and_test: needs: verify_test_script strategy: matrix: os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest] include: - os: ubuntu-latest binary: ./kemforge pip: .venv/bin/pip - os: windows-latest binary: ./kemforge.exe pip: .\.venv\Scripts\pip - os: macos-latest binary: ./kemforge pip: .venv/bin/pip runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }} steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5 if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos')
- name: Set up Go if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Set up Python if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-python@v6 with: python-version: '3.12'
- name: Install dependencies if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: | python -m venv .venv ${{ matrix.pip }} install flask cryptography shell: pwsh
- name: Build if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: go build -v .
- name: Test application if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: pwsh -File test_curl.ps1 ${{ matrix.binary }}
- name: Run application if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: ${{ matrix.binary }} -I https://www.google.com
verify_install: needs: [verify_test_script, build_and_test] strategy: matrix: os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest] runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }} steps: - name: Set up Go if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Install kemforge via go install if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: go install github.com/ConnectingApps/kemforge@${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}
- name: Add Go bin to PATH (Linux/macOS) if: matrix.os != 'windows-latest' && (matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos')) run: echo "$(go env GOPATH)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
- name: Add Go bin to PATH (Windows) if: matrix.os == 'windows-latest' run: | $GoBin = go env GOBIN $GoPath = go env GOPATH $BinPath = if ($GoBin) { $GoBin } else { "$GoPath\bin" } [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path", $env:Path + ";$BinPath", "User") echo "$BinPath" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_PATH -Encoding utf8 shell: pwsh
- name: Run kemforge if: matrix.os != 'macos-latest' || github.ref_name == 'main' || endsWith(github.ref_name, '-macos') || endsWith(github.head_ref, '-macos') run: kemforge -I https://www.google.com
build_snap: needs: [verify_install] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Build snap uses: snapcore/action-build@v1 id: snap-build
- name: Install snap run: sudo snap install --dangerous "${{ steps.snap-build.outputs.snap }}"
- name: Smoke test snap run: /snap/bin/kemforge -I https://www.google.com

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: kemforge base: core24 version: '1.3.2' summary: curl-compatible CLI tool with post-quantum cryptography support description: | KemForge is a modern, curl-compatible CLI tool for making web requests, built with Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) support. It automatically detects whether servers support PQC and warns you if they do not. No dependency on system TLS libraries — PQC works out of the box on every platform, regardless of the underlying TLS library version. grade: stable confinement: strict
apps: kemforge: command: bin/kemforge plugs: - network - home - removable-media
parts: kemforge: plugin: go source: . build-snaps: - go/latest/stable
